title: Section 22
content: The following shall be the authorities of the University:-- (1) The Court, (2) The Executive Council, (3) The Academic Council, 1*** 2[ 3[(3A) The Finance Committee,] (3B) The Faculties, 4[and]] 5* * * * * (4) Such other authorities as may be declared by the Statutes to be authorities of the University.
footnote: 1. The word "and" omitted by Act 62 of 1951, s. 16 (w.e.f. 3-11-1951). 2. Ins. by s. 16, ibid. (w.e.f. 3-11-1951). 3. Ins. by Act 62 of 1981, s. 11 (w.e.f. 10-2-1982). 4. Ins. by Act 62 of 1981, s. 11 (w.e.f. 10-2-1982). 5. Clause (3C) omitted by s. 11, ibid. (w.e.f. 10-2-1982).
